name: Hidden Treasure Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat your oven to 350°F. In a mixing bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, flour, and baking powder.
In a large bowl, stir softened margarine and sweetened condensed milk until smooth and creamy.
Add the graham cracker mixture; mix well.
Stir in coconut flakes and chocolate chips.
Drop by tablespoons onto a lightly sprayed pan.
Bake for 9 to 10 minutes or until golden brown.
